requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Household Refrigerating Appliances under Azerbaijan Energy Programmes
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——阿塞拜疆能效计划下的家用制冷器具
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——亞塞拜然能效計畫下的家用製冷器具

summary.en: Azerbaijan pursues energy efficiency through national energy programmes and state policy aimed at reducing domestic electricity consumption, administered in coordination with AZSTAND for product standardization. For household refrigerating appliances, energy performance is expected to be demonstrated through measurement consistent with internationally recognised IEC test methods (the IEC 62552 series for household refrigerating appliance characteristics and test methods), with declared annual energy consumption （kWh/annum）and, where required, an energy class indication. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member and operates a national regime, so the EAEU energy-efficiency technical regulation （TR EAEU 048/2019）and its labelling format are not automatically applicable; exporters should confirm the current national energy-efficiency declaration and any labelling format requirements with AZSTAND or an in-country importer. The energy basis is expected to track IEC 62552-derived measurement rather than a China-specific grade scale.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆通过旨在降低国内用电的国家能效计划和国家政策推进能效，并与AZSTAND协调进行产品标准化。对于家用制冷器具，能效表现预期须通过与国际公认IEC试验方法（家用制冷器具特性与试验方法的IEC 62552系列）一致的测量证明，声明年耗电量（千瓦时/年），并在需要时标示能效等级。阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员国，实行国家制度，故EAEU能效技术法规（TR EAEU 048/2019）及其标识格式不自动适用；出口商应与AZSTAND或在地进口商确认现行国家能效声明及任何标识格式要求。能效依据预期对应IEC 62552衍生的测量，而非中国特有的等级体系。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然通過旨在降低國內用電的國家能效計畫和國家政策推進能效，並與AZSTAND協調進行產品標準化。對於家用製冷器具，能效表現預期須通過與國際公認IEC試驗方法（家用製冷器具特性與試驗方法的IEC 62552系列）一致的測量證明，聲明年耗電量（千瓦時/年），並在需要時標示能效等級。亞塞拜然非EAEU成員國，實行國家制度，故EAEU能效技術法規（TR EAEU 048/2019）及其標識格式不自動適用；出口商應與AZSTAND或在地進口商確認現行國家能效聲明及任何標識格式要求。能效依據預期對應IEC 62552衍生的測量，而非中國特有的等級體系。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan national energy efficiency programmes / state energy policy — administered with AZSTAND for product standardization
AZS adoption of IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (expected measurement basis)
AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control — energy declaration and labelling format requirements (confirm current edition)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades （Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold）and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory （GB）and enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label （CEL）administered under the energy labelling system （NDRC/SAMR）. Products must display the China Energy Label before sale. The GB 12021.2 grade framework is structurally different from an IEC 62552-based annual-consumption declaration; a Chinese energy grade is not directly transferable to an Azerbaijani energy declaration without recalculation to the applicable measurement basis.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识（CEL）在能效标识制度（NDRC/SAMR）下管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识。GB 12021.2等级框架与基于IEC 62552的年耗电量声明在结构上不同；中国能效等级未经按适用测量基准重新计算，不可直接转用于阿塞拜疆能效声明。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識（CEL）在能效標識制度（NDRC/SAMR）下管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識。GB 12021.2等級框架與基於IEC 62552的年耗電量聲明在結構上不同；中國能效等級未經按適用測量基準重新計算，不可直接轉用於亞塞拜然能效聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators （mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system）
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances （test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series）

gap.en: Two main gaps exist: (1) Different declaration basis — China's GB 12021.2 grade rating does not map directly onto an Azerbaijani energy declaration; energy performance should be expressed as annual consumption （kWh/annum）measured to the IEC 62552 series, and a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not by itself satisfy any national energy-class indication that may be required. (2) Regime and labelling format — because Azerbaijan operates a national （non-EAEU）regime, neither the China Energy Label nor an EAEU TR EAEU 048/2019 energy label automatically satisfies Azerbaijani requirements; the accepted declaration content and label format must be confirmed with AZSTAND or the in-country importer. The exact mandatory status, threshold values, and labelling format under current Azerbaijani energy programmes should be verified against the live regulatory text before market placement.
gap.zh: 存在两项主要差距：（1）声明依据不同——中国GB 12021.2等级评定不直接映射至阿塞拜疆能效声明；能效表现应以依据IEC 62552系列测量的年耗电量（千瓦时/年）表示，中国1级或2级评定本身不满足任何可能要求的国家能效等级标示。（2）制度与标识格式——由于阿塞拜疆实行国家（非EAEU）制度，中国能效标识及EAEU TR EAEU 048/2019能效标签均不自动满足阿塞拜疆要求；可接受的声明内容及标签格式须与AZSTAND或在地进口商确认。现行阿塞拜疆能效计划下的确切强制状态、门槛值及标识格式应在市场投放前针对现行监管文本核实。
gap.zht: 存在兩項主要差距：（1）聲明依據不同——中國GB 12021.2等級評定不直接映射至亞塞拜然能效聲明；能效表現應以依據IEC 62552系列測量的年耗電量（千瓦時/年）表示，中國1級或2級評定本身不滿足任何可能要求的國家能效等級標示。（2）制度與標識格式——由於亞塞拜然實行國家（非EAEU）制度，中國能效標識及EAEU TR EAEU 048/2019能效標籤均不自動滿足亞塞拜然要求；可接受的聲明內容及標籤格式須與AZSTAND或在地進口商確認。現行亞塞拜然能效計畫下的確切強制狀態、門檻值及標識格式應在市場投放前針對現行監管文本核實。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm with AZSTAND / national energy programme — energy performance declaration to IEC 62552-based measurement is expected; exact mandatory thresholds and labelling format under current Azerbaijani energy programmes should be verified （national regime, not EAEU TR EAEU 048/2019）
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Household refrigerator energy performance for Azerbaijan should be declared as annual consumption measured to the IEC 62552 series; a Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not directly transfer. Because Azerbaijan runs a national （non-EAEU）regime, neither the China Energy Label nor an EAEU energy label automatically satisfies requirements. Confirm the exact mandatory thresholds and labelling format with AZSTAND or the in-country importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆家用电冰箱能效表现应以依据IEC 62552系列测量的年耗电量声明；中国GB 12021.2等级不直接转用。由于阿塞拜疆实行国家（非EAEU）制度，中国能效标识及EAEU能效标签均不自动满足要求。出货前应与AZSTAND或在地进口商确认确切的强制门槛及标识格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然家用電冰箱能效表現應以依據IEC 62552系列測量的年耗電量聲明；中國GB 12021.2等級不直接轉用。由於亞塞拜然實行國家（非EAEU）制度，中國能效標識及EAEU能效標籤均不自動滿足要求。出貨前應與AZSTAND或在地進口商確認確切的強制門檻及標識格式。

requirement_topic.en: Voltage and Frequency Compatibility — 220/380 V 50 Hz Grid Match
requirement_topic.zh: 电压与频率兼容性——220/380 V 50 Hz电网匹配
requirement_topic.zht: 電壓與頻率相容性——220/380 V 50 Hz電網匹配

summary.en: Azerbaijan's electricity supply operates at a nominal 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. This is a genuine match with China's nominal 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz domestic grid — both the voltage and the frequency align. As a result, a Chinese household refrigerator designed for the Chinese domestic grid does not require electrical re-engineering of the compressor motor, control board, or power supply for Azerbaijani voltage or frequency conditions. Plug/socket type and any country-specific marking conventions should still be checked, but the core electromechanical design is directly compatible. This voltage/frequency match removes a class of redesign effort that exporters to mismatched-grid markets （for example 120 V 60 Hz markets）would otherwise face.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆电力供应为标称220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz。这与中国标称220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz的国内电网真正匹配——电压和频率均一致。因此，为中国国内电网设计的中国家用电冰箱无需为阿塞拜疆的电压或频率条件对压缩机电机、控制板或电源进行电气重新设计。插头/插座类型及任何国别特定标识惯例仍应核查，但核心机电设计直接兼容。该电压/频率匹配消除了向电网不匹配市场（例如120 V 60 Hz市场）出口时原本须面对的一类重新设计工作。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然電力供應為標稱220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz。這與中國標稱220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz的國內電網真正匹配——電壓和頻率均一致。因此，為中國國內電網設計的中國家用電冰箱無需為亞塞拜然的電壓或頻率條件對壓縮機電機、控制板或電源進行電氣重新設計。插頭/插座類型及任何國別特定標識慣例仍應核查，但核心機電設計直接相容。該電壓/頻率匹配消除了向電網不匹配市場（例如120 V 60 Hz市場）出口時原本須面對的一類重新設計工作。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan grid nominal supply — 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages （reference for nominal supply voltage bands）
AZS adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 — appliance rated-voltage and rated-frequency marking requirements

summary.en: China's domestic grid operates at a nominal 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Chinese household refrigerators certified under CCC （GB 4706.13）are designed and rated for this supply. Rated voltage and rated frequency markings on the appliance reflect the Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz design. Because the Azerbaijani grid shares the same 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal parameters, the rated electrical design carries over directly — unlike export to 110-120 V or 60 Hz markets, where compressor motor speed, control electronics, and power supply would need adaptation.
summary.zh: 中国国内电网为标称220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz。依据CCC（GB 4706.13）认证的中国家用电冰箱按此供电设计和定额。器具上的额定电压和额定频率标识反映中国220 V/50 Hz设计。由于阿塞拜疆电网共享相同的220/380 V 50 Hz标称参数，额定电气设计可直接沿用——这与出口至110-120 V或60 Hz市场不同，后者须对压缩机电机转速、控制电子设备及电源进行适配。
summary.zht: 中國國內電網為標稱220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz。依據CCC（GB 4706.13）認證的中國家用電冰箱按此供電設計和定額。器具上的額定電壓和額定頻率標識反映中國220 V/50 Hz設計。由於亞塞拜然電網共享相同的220/380 V 50 Hz標稱參數，額定電氣設計可直接沿用——這與出口至110-120 V或60 Hz市場不同，後者須對壓縮機電機轉速、控制電子設備及電源進行適配。

standards_or_laws: China domestic grid nominal supply — 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
GB 4706.13-2014 — appliance rated-voltage / rated-frequency marking （CCC mandatory）

gap.en: There is essentially no voltage or frequency gap — this row documents a genuine advantage rather than a deficiency. Because Azerbaijan （220/380 V, 50 Hz）matches China （220/380 V, 50 Hz）on both voltage and frequency, the compressor motor, control board, and power supply require no electrical re-engineering. The residual items to verify are minor and non-electrical-design in nature: (1) plug/socket type and cord set acceptable for the destination; (2) rated-voltage and rated-frequency markings legible and consistent with AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 marking expectations; (3) any country-specific user-information or language requirements on the rating plate. None of these affect the core electromechanical design, so this market does not impose the redesign burden seen in mismatched-grid export markets.
gap.zh: 基本不存在电压或频率差距——本行记录的是真正的优势而非缺陷。由于阿塞拜疆（220/380 V、50 Hz）在电压和频率上均与中国（220/380 V、50 Hz）匹配，压缩机电机、控制板及电源无需电气重新设计。须核实的剩余事项较小且非电气设计性质：（1）目的地可接受的插头/插座类型及电源线组；（2）额定电压与额定频率标识清晰可读，且符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24的标识预期；（3）铭牌上任何国别特定的用户信息或语言要求。上述均不影响核心机电设计，故该市场不构成电网不匹配出口市场所见的重新设计负担。
gap.zht: 基本不存在電壓或頻率差距——本行記錄的是真正的優勢而非缺陷。由於亞塞拜然（220/380 V、50 Hz）在電壓和頻率上均與中國（220/380 V、50 Hz）匹配，壓縮機電機、控制板及電源無需電氣重新設計。須核實的剩餘事項較小且非電氣設計性質：（1）目的地可接受的插頭/插座類型及電源線組；（2）額定電壓與額定頻率標識清晰可讀，且符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24的標識預期；（3）銘牌上任何國別特定的用戶資訊或語言要求。上述均不影響核心機電設計，故該市場不構成電網不匹配出口市場所見的重新設計負擔。

mandatory_status.target: No re-engineering required — 220/380 V 50 Hz matches China; appliance rated-voltage / rated-frequency marking per AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 still applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — rated-voltage / rated-frequency marking under GB 4706.13-2014 （CCC）; designed for China 220/380 V 50 Hz grid

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid genuinely matches China's, so Chinese refrigerators need no voltage or frequency re-engineering — a real advantage versus 120 V / 60 Hz markets. Only minor items remain: plug/socket type, rated-voltage/frequency marking per AZS/IEC 60335-2-24, and any rating-plate language requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国真正匹配，故中国电冰箱无需电压或频率重新设计——相对120 V/60 Hz市场是真正的优势。仅余少量事项：插头/插座类型、依据AZS/IEC 60335-2-24的额定电压/频率标识，及任何铭牌语言要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國真正匹配，故中國電冰箱無需電壓或頻率重新設計——相對120 V/60 Hz市場是真正的優勢。僅餘少量事項：插頭/插座類型、依據AZS/IEC 60335-2-24的額定電壓/頻率標識，及任何銘牌語言要求。
